description: Targeted negative point prompts for courtyard and complex-roof cases. This experiment tests whether explicit exclusion cues inside courtyards improve the SAM2 update proposals compared with the earlier globally applied ring-negative variant.

target_cases.reason: courtyard / multi-level roof case; previous specialised pass unstable
courtyard / context ambiguity; topology refinement previously helped
multi-part roof / potential inner non-building area

notes: The default negative point positions are placeholders at chip centre and must be checked on the generated debug figures before running SAM2.
For a valid experiment, place the negative point into the courtyard or non-building area that should be excluded, not on the building roof itself.
The experiment is intentionally targeted. It should not replace the earlier Exp03b ring-negative result, which was a global strategy and often degraded performance.
